# **🛒 E-Commerce Recommendation System**

## **📌 Project Overview**

Finding the right product among millions of options is a core challenge in modern e-commerce. To tackle this, I developed a **Full-Stack Personalized Recommendation System** utilizing the Amazon Reviews 2023 dataset (Appliances category).

This project is built from scratch as an end-to-end solution, featuring a robust **Hybrid Recommendation Engine** on the backend and an interactive, user-friendly UI powered by Streamlit on the frontend. It seamlessly handles data preprocessing, algorithm modeling, and real-time interaction tracking.

## **✨ Key Features**

* **Interactive Web Interface:** A modern, responsive catalog browsing experience with real-time product suggestions.  
* **Cold Start Handling:** Implemented a popularity-based fallback mechanism using review counts and average ratings for new users.  
* **Dynamic User Tracking:** Captures and utilizes real-time user click behavior to update session-based recommendations.  
* **Algorithm Explainability (XAI):** Built a unique "Algorithm Analysis" panel in the UI that transparently shows users exactly *how* and *why* a product was recommended by breaking down the scores of each sub-algorithm.

## **🧠 Algorithmic Architecture**

To ensure high accuracy, diversity, and relevance, I designed an advanced hybrid architecture integrating five distinct recommendation strategies:

### **1\. Content-Based Filtering (Text Similarity)**

* **Approach:** Extracted and cleaned unstructured text from product titles, descriptions, and features.  
* **Tech:** Utilized **TF-IDF Vectorization** (with n-grams) and computed **Cosine Similarity**.  
* **Optimization:** Accelerated matrix operations using **Numba** library for high-speed parallel computation.

### **2\. Association Rule Mining (Frequent Itemsets)**

* **Approach:** Analyzed transactional data and "also bought" / "also viewed" metadata to uncover hidden purchasing patterns.  
* **Tech:** Implemented market basket analysis principles to recommend high-confidence product bundles.

### **3\. Customer & Product Segmentation (Clustering)**

* **Approach:** Segmented the market into distinct clusters (e.g., "DIY Repair", "Premium Appliances") based on pricing, category, and brand features.  
* **Tech:** Applied **K-Means Clustering**, evaluating optimal ![][image1] using Silhouette Scores, enabling precise demographic targeting.

### **4\. Link Analysis (Product Influence)**

* **Approach:** Modeled product relationships as a directed graph where interactions (views/buys) act as edges.  
* **Tech:** Calculated **PageRank** scores to identify "central" or highly influential products within the appliance network.

### **5\. Collaborative Filtering (Rating Prediction)**

* **Approach:** Leveraged historical user-item interaction matrices to predict ratings for unobserved items.  
* **Tech:** Applied **Singular Value Decomposition (SVD)** via TruncatedSVD to extract latent features and predict user preferences.

### **🚀 The Hybrid Engine**

The final recommendation is generated by a weighted scoring system that aggregates signals from all the above modules. The system dynamically adjusts weights based on data availability (e.g., re-distributing weights if CF data is sparse):

## **![][image2]🛠️ Tech Stack**

* **Language:** Python  
* **Frontend:** Streamlit, HTML/CSS (Custom UI Styling)  
* **Data Processing:** Pandas, NumPy, SciPy (Sparse Matrices)  
* **Machine Learning:** Scikit-learn (SVD, K-Means, TF-IDF)  
* **Natural Language Processing:** NLTK, TextBlob (Sentiment Analysis)  
* **Performance:** Numba (JIT Compilation)

## **⚙️ Installation & Usage**

1. **Clone the repository:**  
   git clone \[https://github.com/yourusername/Amazon-Recommendation-System.git\](https://github.com/yourusername/Amazon-Recommendation-System.git)  
   cd Amazon-Recommendation-System

2. **Install the dependencies:**  
   pip install \-r requirements.txt

3. **Initialize NLP libraries:**  
   python nltk\_setup.py

4. **Run the application:**  
   streamlit run app.py

*(Note: The application includes a built-in data downloader that will automatically fetch the necessary Amazon datasets from Google Drive upon first launch.)*

## **📁 Project Structure**

.  
├── app.py                  \# Main Streamlit application and recommendation engine  
├── nltk\_setup.py           \# Setup script for NLTK corpora  
├── requirements.txt        \# Project dependencies  
└── README.md               \# Project documentation

## **📈 Future Improvements**

* ![][image3]Integrate multimodal metadata (e.g., processing product images using CNNs).  
* ![][image3]Implement deep learning approaches like Neural Collaborative Filtering (NCF).  
* ![][image3]Migrate the backend to a scalable API using FastAPI.

*Designed and developed as a comprehensive showcase of data mining, machine learning, and full-stack software engineering.*
